title: xanthium strumarium subsp. brasilicum
intro: Xanthium strumarium subsp. brasilicum is a subspecies of the cocklebur plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Xanthium strumarium subsp. brasilicum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
